allow: PowerShell($body='{"x":400,"y":200}'; Invoke-RestMethod -Uri http://127.0.0.1:7878/click -Method Post -Body $body -TimeoutSec 5; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 300; Invoke-WebRequest http://127.0.0.1:7878/screenshot -OutFile "$env:TEMP\\shot1.png" -TimeoutSec 10; "saved")

PowerShell($body='{"x":400,"y":223}'; Invoke-RestMethod -Uri http://127.0.0.1:7878/click -Method Post -Body $body -TimeoutSec 5; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 300; Invoke-WebRequest http://127.0.0.1:7878/screenshot -OutFile "$env:TEMP\\shot3.png" -TimeoutSec 10; "saved")
PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri http://127.0.0.1:7878/ping -Method Get -TimeoutSec 3; "PING: $r" } catch { "PING failed: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })
